title: BEM-942 Block K gates
objective:
Run script:
"""
def write_file(path, text):
    p=Path(path)
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(p))

write_file('governance/gates/production_operator_gate.json', '''{
  "version": "1.0",
  "date": "2026-05-31",
  "status": "OPERATOR_REQUIRED",
  "purpose": "Production actions that require operator approval.",
  "gates": [
    {"id":"telegram_production_webhook", "status":"operator_required", "reason":"Real webhook/secrets affect production channel."},
    {"id":"schedule_or_daemon", "status":"operator_required", "reason":"Persistent automation requires explicit approval."},
    {"id":"paid_api_or_live_llm_runtime", "status":"operator_required", "reason":"Paid or external provider runtime cannot be enabled autonomously."},
    {"id":"issue31_write", "status":"operator_required", "reason":"Contract forbids issue #31 writes without permission."},
    {"id":"real_pilot", "status":"operator_required", "reason":"Real client/pilot scope must be chosen by operator."}
  ]
}
''')

write_file('governance/gates/secret_names.md', '''# Secret names for operator review

Values must never be written to repository files.

Required/possible secret names:
- TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
- TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET
- AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT
- GITHUB_TOKEN / GITHUB_PAT as allowed by GitHub Actions context
- CLAUDE_PROVIDER_TOKEN if live provider runtime is enabled by operator
- CODEX_PROVIDER_TOKEN if separate provider secret is required

Status: names only, no values.
No issue comments.
''')

write_file('governance/gates/issue31_write_policy.md', '''# Issue #31 write policy

Status: OPERATOR_GATE

Rule:
- Writing comments or updates to issue #31 is forbidden unless explicitly approved by operator.
- Reports must be written to repository files and operator channels instead.
- Any automation attempting issue #31 write must stop with operator_gate.

No issue comments.
''')

write_file('governance/gates/schedule_daemon_gate.md', '''# Schedule / daemon gate

Status: OPERATOR_GATE

Rule:
- New schedule triggers are forbidden unless approved by operator.
- Always-on daemon mode is forbidden unless approved by operator.
- Existing allowed baseline remains workflow_dispatch.
- curator-hourly-report.yml exception remains governed by operator report period config.

No issue comments.
''')

write_file('governance/gates/telegram_production_gate.md', '''# Telegram production gate

Status: OPERATOR_GATE

Current state:
- Telegram mock/foundation route is described.
- production_status remains null.

Operator decision required for:
- real webhook registration/change,
- real Telegram secret verification,
- sending production test message,
- changing default report period from 1h.

No issue comments.
''')

write_file('governance/gates/llm_runtime_gate.md', '''# Live LLM runtime gate

Status: OPERATOR_GATE

Rule:
- Deterministic runners and state-file workflows may be implemented autonomously.
- Live LLM provider runtime using external paid APIs or credentials requires operator approval.
- Provider contracts may be documented and validated without live runtime.

No issue comments.
''')

write_file('governance/validators/validate_block_k_gates.py', '''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from pathlib import Path
required = [
  'governance/gates/production_operator_gate.json',
  'governance/gates/secret_names.md',
  'governance/gates/issue31_write_policy.md',
  'governance/gates/schedule_daemon_gate.md',
  'governance/gates/telegram_production_gate.md',
  'governance/gates/llm_runtime_gate.md'
]
missing = [p for p in required if not Path(p).exists()]
if missing:
    raise SystemExit('MISSING: ' + ', '.join(missing))
gate = json.loads(Path('governance/gates/production_operator_gate.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert gate['status'] == 'OPERATOR_REQUIRED'
print('BEM-942 Block K gates validator PASS')
''')

''')

append='''\n\n## BEM-942 completed | 2026-05-31\nImplemented Block K operator gates after BEM-941.\nCreated production_operator_gate, secret_names, issue31 write policy, schedule/daemon gate, Telegram production gate, live LLM runtime gate and validator.\nResult: BLOCK_K_OPERATOR_GATES_PASS. Operator approvals are still required for production actions.\nNext: Block L Claude re-audit checklist, evidence index and audit bundle baseline.\nNo issue comments.\n'''
ctx.write_text(ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')+append, encoding='utf-8')

ops_applied.append('BEM-942 Block K operator gates artifacts created')
